_comment: Declarative workflow definition for teacher-profile. Captures one teacher's operating context via a wizard, models their role/handoffs/preferences, registers into shared context as sop_refs + overrides, and stores in a gitignored local profile.
description: Profile setup: wizard intake → role/handoff modeling → context registration → validation → quality gate

steps.note: Interview per references/wizard.md: display name, school, role(s), duties, handoff map, preferences/defaults. Teacher-stated facts are provenance:teacher_stated (always wins).
Build role-based handoff map (case manager, AP, counselor, co-teacher) per references/profile-model.md. Role-based, not person-based — survives staff turnover.
Register profile into shared context so lesson-planner, family-communication, meeting-classifier etc. adapt automatically.
Write to gitignored shared/context/profiles/teacher.local.json. Validate against teacher.schema.json. Never commit real teacher data.

note: Profile is gitignored (teacher's own data, opt-in, never pushed). No student PII ever. Updating the profile updates behavior on the next run — no skill edit, no redeploy.
